title: VCC DSSE Envelope (v0.2)
description: Portable JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for the DSSE envelope that wraps a signed VCC statement. Mirrors `envelopeSchema` in verifiers/typescript/src/schemas.ts. The payload is base64(JCS(statement)); payloadType is the fixed DSSE type; signatures are 1..4 Ed25519 signatures. CONTRACT §2: keyids MUST be unique across the array — JSON Schema uniqueItems cannot express object-field uniqueness, so the verifier enforces unique keyids; documented as $comment below.

payload.$comment: base64(JCS(statement)). 90000-char cap ~= 64KB pre-decode (base64 inflates 4/3; enforced again post-decode by the verifier). BASE64_STD_RE.

signatures.$comment: CONTRACT §2: min 1, max 4 signatures. uniqueItems on the array only rejects fully-identical objects; it does NOT enforce that keyids are unique (two signatures could share a keyid with different sig bytes). The verifier rejects duplicate keyids across the array. Keep uniqueItems as a cheap first line.

sig.$comment: Ed25519 sig = 64 bytes -> 88 base64 chars with padding. Bounded 86..90.
